message:
fix(feishu,line): use capability IDs in OperationInfo related fields

Feishu: 6 related fields used operation IDs (OP_MESSAGES_REPLY,
OP_MESSAGES_SEND, OP_CHATS_GET, etc.) in CapabilityId slots. Fixed to
use correct capability constants (CAP_MSG_WRITE, CAP_CHATS_READ,
CAP_DOCS_READ).

LINE: 8 related fields used operation IDs (OP_REPLY, OP_PUSH,
OP_GROUP_MEMBERS, OP_RICH_MENU_CREATE, etc.) in CapabilityId slots.
Fixed to use correct capability constants (CAP_MSG_WRITE,
CAP_PROFILE_READ, CAP_MENU_WRITE).

Same class of bug as fixed in signal connector (b9be38fc).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
